critique_summary: Decision policy: ACCEPT if visual_relevance >= 7, prompt_faithfulness >= 7, transformation_quality >= 7, and automatic signal >= threshold; otherwise REVISE. The generated image has pixel similarity 0.92, color similarity 0.03, brightness shift -0.04, and change level 0.08 for stylization mode. Automatic signal (heuristic_proxy) is 0.757. CLIP was unavailable or disabled, so this score is a labeled color/brightness heuristic proxy rather than true CLIP similarity.

human_evaluation_template.human_notes: Manual review: the cat remains the central subject and the cyberpunk direction is visible through stronger color and contrast; more neon detail would improve it.
